description_long: This is a single-story rectangular house with a flat roof and a simple, modern design. The exterior walls are clad in a light tan or beige material, possibly stucco or brick, with several evenly spaced rectangular windows along the main facade. The house features a prominent attached garage with a double door, and a main entry door located adjacent to the garage. The interior layout includes a visible dining area, a bathroom, and other living spaces, separated by white partition walls. The windows are arranged in a symmetrical row on the front, providing ample natural light to the main living areas.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, tan exterior, symmetrical front windows, and an attached garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, symmetrical windows, and the attached garage with a double door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid garage wall and the rear of the house with fewer windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall with a single window and the open garage interior.
description_view_3: Side view showing the dining area window and the plain exterior wall of the garage.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with no porch, adjacent to the garage, and no decorative elements.
